title: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Arunachal Pradesh

overview.short: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area of India in the Himalayan foothills of West Kameng District, Arunachal Pradesh.
overview.description: Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area of India in the Himalayan foothills of West Kameng District, Arunachal Pradesh. It conjoins Sessa Orchid Sanctuary to the northeast and Pakke Tiger Reserve across the Kameng river to the east. Elevation ranges from 500 to 3,250 m (1,640 to 10,660 ft). It is a part of the Kameng Elephant Reserve.

topPlaces.name: Kameng Elephant Reserve
topPlaces.description: The Kameng Elephant Reserve, also known as the Kameng Protected Area Complex, is a protected area in the East and West Kameng districts of western Arunachal Pradesh, India. The reserve comprises the three protected areas of Sessa Orchid Sanctuary, Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary, and Pakke Tiger Reserve, as well as the Amortala, Doimara and Papum reserved forests within the Khellong Forest Division.

items.note: The Kameng Elephant Reserve, also known as the Kameng Protected Area Complex, is a protected area in the East and West Kameng districts of western Arunachal Pradesh, India. The reserve comprises the three protected areas of Sessa Orchid Sanctuary, Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary, and Pakke Tiger Reserve, as well as the Amortala, Doimara and Papum reserved forests within the Khellong Forest Division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (137 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (121 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Eaglenest Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kameng Elephant Reserve.
